ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot mimicking the solidity and immovability of a rock. The sequence emphasizes stability and strength, reflecting the rock's inherent qualities.  The robot will hold its arms out slightly, palms down, as if presenting the rock, then return to a neutral position. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms slightly extended outward, with hands flat and palms down. Frame 2 shows a slight increase in the arm's extension, emphasizing the weight or solidity of the rock. Frame 3 shows the arms returning to a neutral position. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a relaxed position at the robot's sides.

frames.beat: arms extend slightly, palms down, presenting the rock
arms push out further, emphasizing the rock's weight
arms retract slightly, steadying the pose
arms return to rest at the sides, solid and still
